message:
feat(extensions): add SEC-3.3 reason codes, SEC-4.3/4.4 policy types, golden tests

SEC-3.3: Add 6 deterministic reason codes to evaluate_runtime_risk():
- burst_rate_anomaly, high_error_rate, consecutive_failure_escalation,
  dangerous_capability_escalation, unseen_capability_transition,
  sensitive_target_mismatch
Plus 14 golden fixture unit tests verifying base scores, formula
determinism, and reason code trigger conditions.

SEC-4.3: Add ExecMediationArtifact/SecretBrokerArtifact structs,
sha256_hex_standalone helper, Deserialize on ledger entry types.

SEC-4.4: Add PolicyExplanation, CapabilityExplanation,
ProfileTransitionCheck, DangerousOptInAuditEntry types,
decision_strictness/mode_strictness helpers,
explain_effective_policy() and is_valid_downgrade() on ExtensionPolicy,
resolve_extension_policy_with_metadata() on Config.

Also fixes clippy lints: const fn for strictness helpers and
effective_profile_str, pass-by-value for PolicyDecision.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
